mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_api_transaction_log ( request_uri, http_method, client_ip, user_id_masked, mdn_masked, ret_code, ret_msg, elapsed_ms, requested_at, responded_at ) VALUES ( #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{clientIp}, #{userIdMasked}, #{mdnMasked}, #{retCode}, #{retMsg}, #{elapsedMs}, #{requestedAt}, #{respondedAt} )
